properties.summary: Muscle relaxant and CNS depressant used to relieve skeletal muscle spasms and associated pain in acute musculoskeletal conditions. Sometimes prescribed off-label for treatment of fibromyalgia or as a sleep aid. The drug is reported to have little recreational value alone, but may potentiate some opioids. May cause drowsiness, dry mouth and dizziness.
properties.warning: Do not mix with other CNS depressants, or within two weeks of a MAOI.
